violations.text: The establishment does not have a written procedure for cleaning vomit and diarrhea. Procedures provided for establishment. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Containers/covers were observed stored directly under a soap dispenser next to hand sink. Equipment/utensils to be stored in a manner to prevent contamination. Items relocated. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025
The floor in the basement area has an accumulation of rodent droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 04/03/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the basement area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 02/17/2024
